creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
MASTER_SITES has gone missing for www/mod_log_config-st because the original source maintainer has abandoned the project.
This is an effort to correct that, as I can easily maintain this port as long as the FreeBSD project, and it's users find it of any value.

Fix: Apply the attached patch file(s)
One for the Makefile, and
One for the distinfo


Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Attempt to fetch/install www/mod_log_config-st
